snippet.title: Foreigner - I Want To Know What Love Is (Live) // Original Band Reunites & Joins Current Members
snippet.description:
Watch rock and roll history with one of music’s most anticipated reunion events as ‘Foreigner - Double Vision: Then And Now’ celebrates the 40th anniversary of the band’s multi-platinum 1978 album ‘Double Vision’ with a masterful live performance of the band’s biggest hits, filmed at Soaring Eagle Casino & Resort, Mount Pleasant, Michigan, USA in 2017.

With more than 80 million albums sold and 16 Top 30 hits, Foreigner is universally hailed as one of the most popular rock acts in the world. During the concert Lou Gramm, Al Greenwood, Dennis Elliott, Ian McDonald and Rick Wills join Mick Jones and Foreigner’s current lineup - Kelly Hansen, Tom Gimbel, Jeff Pilson, Michael Bluestein, Bruce Watson and Chris Frazier - for the very first time in the band’s 40-year history. Both incarnations of the band share the same stage for an epic performance.

Enhanced 4k version.

Watch the full show: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLOmUKmHMjS3tfq9Hi6fgqKQt5RnyyIQRg

#Foreigner #LouGramm #Reunion

(Ozuna)
(W)
Será la magia que tienen tus ojos y esos truquitos para enamorar

Escápate conmigo (Yeah) esta noche, bebé (Ajá)

Te quiero comer (Bebé), tus labios besar (Oye bien)

Bebé, no digas que no (No, no, no)
Si sólo somos tú y yo (Yeh, yeh, yeh)
Y se te eriza la piel (Te eriza la piel)
Cuando entramos en calor

Si sólo somos tú y yo (Yeh, yeh, yeh)

Señores, la poderosa

Mi supernova (Heh), la que una sonrisa me roba
Tremenda loba, sólo un beso y calienta la alcoba
Se me pega y me soba, no se incomoda
La baby es una pantera, yo soy su casanova (Heh-heh)
Escápate conmigo (Pa-pa), donde no haya testigos (Pa-pa)
Si te preguntan, diles que soy tu mejor amigo (Pa-pa-pa)
Yo quiero un beso, tú quieres castigo
Sabes que no te obligo
Te deseo, siempre te lo digo
(Mamita, deja la ventana abierta)

[Coro: Ozuna & Wisin]
Escápate conmigo esta noche, bebé
Te quiero comer, te va a encantar (Yeh, yeh)
Tú sabes que conmigo siempre la pasas bien (La pasas bien)
Te quiero comer (Bebé), tus labios besar
(Yo en verdad no sé qué tiene)

[Puente: Wisin & Ozuna]
Es que yo quiero un poco más (Un poco más)
De tu rica desnudez (De tu desnudez)
Es que el sudor de tu piel (De tu piel)
Es el que yo quiero probar (Princesa)
Es que yo quiero un poco más (Un poco más)
De tu rica desnudez (De tu desnudez)
Es que el sudor de tu piel (Yeah)
Es el que yo quiero probar
Baby, andamos con los poderes
Ozuna

[Verso 2: Ozuna & Wisin]
Mi mente descontrola
Y si la llamo, ella me dice que la busque, que está sola
Que no hay tiempo, pero haciéndolo no se demora (Yeah)
Y si le fallo, que tranquilo, porque no se enamora
Tranquila, la vida conmigo te la vacilas
Que no he visto otra baby de tu liga
Esos besitos que me dan ganas
De amanecer contigo todas las mañanas
(A las dos de madrugada estoy en tu casa)

[Coro: Wisin & Ozuna]
Escápate conmigo esta noche, bebé (Ajá)
Te quiero comer (Es solo eso), te va a encantar
Tú sabes que conmigo siempre la pasas bien
Te quiero comer, tus labios besar

Bebé, no digas que no (No, no, no)
Si sólo somos tú y yo (Yeh, yeh, yeh)
Y se te eriza la piel (Te eriza la piel)
Cuando entramos en calor (Bañados en sudor)
Bebé, no digas que no (No, no, no)
Si sólo somos tú y yo (Yeh, yeh, yeh)
Si se te eriza la piel (Te eriza la piel)
Cuando entramos en calor (Bañados en sudor)

[Outro: Wisin]

snippet.title: Calling All Villains - Announcement Trailer
snippet.description:
Calling All Villains is a 3D animated sci-fi/action/comedy series produced and creatively helmed by ZAMination, starring Mr. Puzzles--originally from SMG4.

This isn’t a direct continuation of SMG4. Set years later, the series follows Mr. Puzzles as he’s evolved--for better or worse... roping him into all-new adventures with a brand new cast of characters. Haven't seen SMG4? No problem! Calling All Villains is built as a fresh starting point, so you can jump right in and enjoy the ride. And for longtime fans, there are plenty of hidden nods and juicy Easter eggs waiting for you... 

With full blessing from SMG4, we've been given the rights to continue Mr. Puzzles’ story and bring this series to life. The pilot episode is currently in production, with the full release planned for later this year. More updates are coming soon, so remember... 

STAY TUNED...

snippet.title: Grupo Firme, Gerardo Coronel - Qué Onda Perdida (Letra)
snippet.description:
#GrupoFirme #GerardoCoronel #QuéOndaPerdida  #Letra 
Grupo Firme, Gerardo Coronel - Qué Onda Perdida

(Letra):
[Intro]
Échele, mi compa Jerry
¿Y dónde andas, peleonera, que no te escucho? Jaja
¿Qué va, chiquitita?

[Verso]
Qué onda perdida
Soy tu ex, el último de tus amores
Me tomé el atrevimiento de mandarte flores
Si la' recibes, por favor, sonríe, no llores
Ya ves, perdida
Uno siempre vuelve a donde lo quisieron
No me bloqueaste del WhatsApp y eso para mí es nuevo
Me da pеnsar que podemos comenzar dе nuevo

[Coro]
Qué onda perdida
Ya volvió el cabrón que más te ha querido
Y aunque no quieras saber de mí, te digo
No te puedo olvidar y la neta tampoco he querido
Qué onda perdida
Te me alistas porque hoy te llevo la banda
Y no me voy a ir de tu casa hasta que salgas
Hoy te quiero mirar pa' que me digas en la cara
Que ya no me quieres, que tú no me extrañas
Y que alguien mejor está ocupando tu cama

[Interludio]
Ay, chiquitita, como la quiero
Y dicen que e' alguien mejor, compa, jajaja
No creo, batallosa, no se puede
Mi compa Jerry

snippet.title: Cómo HBO está MANIPULANDO a los fans de Harry Potter (El caso Snape)
snippet.description:
El primer tráiler de la serie de Harry Potter (HBO Max) ya está aquí, y con él, una polémica que ha escalado hasta las amenazas de muerte. ¿Es el nuevo casting, especialmente el de Paapa Essiedu como Severus Snape, un intento de "inclusión forzada" o una fría estrategia de marketing de Warner Bros para generar ruido mediático?

En este video, analizamos por qué el fandom de JK Rowling está tan furioso con el reboot televisivo de La Piedra Filosofal. Exploramos las diferencias entre las películas originales y esta nueva adaptación que promete ser más oscura y fiel a los libros. ¿Lograrán los nuevos actores (Dominic McLaughlin, Arabella Stanton, Alastair Stout) superar la nostalgia de Daniel Radcliffe y Emma Watson? ¿O estamos ante el intento desesperado de Hollywood por ordeñar una franquicia hasta dejarla seca?

Lyrics:
Yo
caminaré entre las piedras
hasta sentir el temblor en mis piernas.
A veces tengo temor (lo sé),
a veces, vergüenza.
Estoy
sentado en un cráter desierto
sigo aguardando el temblor
en mi cuerpo.
Nadie me vio partir (lo sé),
nadie me espera.
Hay una grieta en mi corazón,
un planeta con desilusión…
Sé
que te encontraré en estas ruinas,
ya no tendremos que hablar y hablar del temblor.
Te besaré en el templo (lo sé),
será un buen momento.
El temblor...
despiértame cuando pase el temblor

snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense.

localized.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
localized.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore.

I see my future in your eyes

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark, with you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass, listening to our favorite song

I don't deserve this, darling, you look perfect tonight
